tools.Name: VideoLingo
tools.Description: An all-in-one AI video localization platform that automates subtitle cutting, translation, alignment, and dubbing.
tools.Use_Case: Creating Netflix-quality multilingual subtitles and dubbing for videos, enabling global knowledge sharing.

tools.Name: Skill Seekers
tools.Description: A universal data preprocessing layer that converts documentation, codebases, PDFs, and videos into structured assets for AI agents and RAG pipelines.
tools.Use_Case: Preparing context for AI coding assistants (Cursor, Windsurf) and building RAG pipelines (LangChain, LlamaIndex) in minutes.

tools.Name: LMCache
tools.Description: A high-performance KV cache serving extension that offloads and shares KV caches across CPU, Disk, and S3.
tools.Use_Case: Reducing time-to-first-token (TTFT) and increasing throughput for long-context LLM applications like RAG and multi-round chat.
